name: Breakfast Baked Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 egg, fork-beaten with a little milk
salt, pepper and garlic powder to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub and pare the potatoes, but do not peel them.
2. Slice each potato lengthwise into fourths.
3. Butter a shallow microwave-safe baking dish.
4. Dip each potato slice first into the egg mixture, then into the toast crumbs, coating evenly.
5. Place the coated potato slices in the baking dish.
6. Top the slices with any remaining toast crumbs.
7. Dot each layer with about one tablespoon of butter, if desired.
8. Microwave on 100% power for 3-5 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and the egg coating is set.
9. If desired, top with a slice of cheese.
10. Continue microwaving for an additional minute to melt the cheese.
11. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, and garlic powder to taste.
